description: §38.13.1 — a `<channel watches=widgets>` naming a table declared by NO `<schema>` (and no §52 authority collection) fires E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-UNKNOWN-TABLE. The compiler needs the table's row shape + PK to synthesize RowChange (§38.13.2) and emit the capture (§38.13.7); an undeclared table has neither.
rationale: §38.13.1: the `watches=` table SHALL name a table whose row shape + PK the compiler can resolve — declared by a `<schema>` block or a §52 `authority="server" table=` collection. A table declared by NEITHER SHALL emit E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-UNKNOWN-TABLE.
